---
title: "02analysis"
format: html
---

```{r}
#correlation between VVIQ2 and subj_priming 
cor.test(between_subj$VVIQ2, between_subj$subj_prime)
#p=0.6719
```

```{r}
#correlation between VVIQ2 and avg vividness 
cor.test(between_subj$VVIQ2, between_subj$avg_vividness)
#p=0.01244
```

```{r}
#correlation between VVIQ2 and obj_priming 
cor.test(between_subj$VVIQ2, between_subj$congruence_effect)
#p=0.9262
```

```{r}
#correlation between subj_priming and avg vividness
cor.test(between_subj$subj_prime, between_subj$avg_vividness)
#p=0.4722
```

```{r}
#correlation between obj_prime and avg vividness
cor.test(between_subj$congruence_effect, between_subj$avg_vividness)
#p=0.3997
```
